quote: Bazzite is the absolute best gaming OS I have ever used. Everything just works, out of the box, and performance is stunning on both PC and handheld.
I wiped my main gaming rig and installed Bazzite. No regrets. It breathes new life into older hardware while extracting maximum performance.
The seamless integration with Steam Deck and other handheld controllers is masterclass level. The Universal Blue team is doing incredible work here.
Bazzite is exactly what a modern gaming OS should be: immutable, auto-updating, and with near-zero overhead. Simply gorgeous.
